settings.title: Get in touch with our atelier.
settings.lead: Whether you would like to see our pieces in person, commission something bespoke, or simply say hello — write to us. We are a small studio, and every message is read personally.

settings.atelier_hours: Visits 10:00–18:00, Monday–Friday, by appointment via e-mail.
